highlights.summary:

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely in love with the college.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements as it is MBBS. The academic results are quite high. All professors are super educated and experienced so the college is ranked 1 in Kerala University of Health Science University exams in 2022. It is ranked 2nd in 2023.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is located on top of a mountain near Cheruthoni Dam. The campus is quite small but the total plot is 50 acres. Mostly it is surrounded by trees which gives a calm atmosphere. The climate of the hostel is super awesome.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied because facilities are getting improved.

review_content.Placements: I got admission to Government Medical College Idukki in 2022 based on my NEET exam score. Our batch has 100 students, and the same number is in the junior batch. Currently, I’m in my second year, with clinical postings in medicine, surgery, obstetrics and gynecology, pediatrics, community medicine, etc. After completing 4 years, we are required to work here for 1 year as house surgeons.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is still under development. Hostel facilities for ladies are really nice, but those for boys need improvement; we hope for new hostels by next month. We have a central library with numerous medical books and Wi-Fi service. Labs are fully equipped, and new classrooms are being prepared. The food in the mess is good, and the sports club is active.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Wildlife of an MBBS graduate within the campus.

review_content.Placements: As this is a government college, most of the placements will be done by the government itself through the Public Service Commission (PSC). Also, after completing the course, one graduate can enroll for PG or work as a general physician and medical officer with an MBBS.
review_content.Infrastructure: When it comes to infrastructure, there are mainly four blocks: a principal's office with various departments like anatomy, biochemistry, physiology, and a central library; another block including the second and third-year departments like forensic, community medicine, microbiology, pathology, pharmacology; and two hospital blocks, one for mother and child care and the other comprising all the OPs and wards. The girls' hostel is under construction, so girls are temporarily accommodated in the boys' hostel.

highlights.summary: Guru Nanak Dev University College, Verka, GNDU, is located in Amritsar, Punjab. Established in 2011, it is an institute. Guru Nanak Dev University College, Verka, GNDU provides 20 UG, PG and Certificate courses in 4 specialisations, namely Information Technology, Medical Laboratory Technology, Computer Science and Mathematics. Theses programmes are offered in both Full Time mode. B.Sc., M.Sc., BCA, B.Com, B.A., BBA, M.Com, PG Diploma, UG Diploma, M.A., B.Voc, PGDCA and Certificate are some of the courses offered at Guru Nanak Dev University College, Verka, GNDU. Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Engineering, Science, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce and Medicine & Health Sciences. The total fee at Guru Nanak Dev University College, Verka, GNDU ranges between INR 21,175 and 97,515. Guru Nanak Dev University College, Verka, GNDU has a student intake of 11 for all the courses. The average median package at Guru Nanak Dev University College, Verka, GNDU is INR 4,46,000. Guru Nanak Dev University College, Verka, GNDU offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Guru Nanak Dev University College, Verka, GNDU offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Science and Design. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.Sc., M.Com and PG Diploma. Guru Nanak Dev University College, Verka, GNDU courses are offered to students in offline mode. Further, the fees structure for Guru Nanak Dev University College, Verka, GNDU courses stands around INR 21,175 to 97,515.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Nightmare on campus overpriced, underwhelming experience.

content.Placements: I am currently pursuing BCA, but I know from my seniors about placements that are given in our college. Only 5 students out of 50 get placed. The highest package provided by my college is 12 LPA. Reliance is the top recruitment company. 10% of students get internships from my college.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi connection in our lab. Out of 40 computers, only 10 computers work properly in my college computer lab. Fans in my class are too slow, and some light bulbs are broken. There is not a single drinking water connection in my college. If I want to drink water, I have to buy it from outside the college because there is no canteen in my college.

paragraphs: NIELIT Agartala admission process 2025 ois both entrance-based and merit-based.The institute is the 11 centre of NIELIT institutions in the country, established in 2009. It aims to facilitate the youth of Tripura to have easy access to education and training in the field of Computer Science and Information Technology. The centre is AICTE-approved and its formal courses are affiliated withTripura University.NIELIT Agartala admission to short-term courses is offered on a first-come, first-served basis. For long-term courses, candidates have to appear forNIELIT Exam.Admission to formal courses are conducted based on a candidate's academic merit. The application mode is online.

The NIELIT Agartala admissions are offered in more than 22 centres. Candidates seeking admission to NIELIT Agartala's long-term courses must appear for theNIELIT Exam. The duration of CHM programmes is six months and that of the rest of the programmes is one year. Candidates must satisfy the eligibility criteria of the course that they intend to apply for. The admission sessions happen twice a year. The major courses offered by NIELIT Agartala along with the eligibility and application details are presented below:
NIELIT Course
Eligibility Criteria
Diploma in Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering
Class 10 pass or equivalent qualification with 35% aggregate
Diploma in Computer Science & Technology
Class 10 pass or equivalent qualification with 35% aggregate
Class 12 pass or three-year Diploma in relevant fields with at least subjects out of Physics, Mathematics and Statistics
Industrial Training Programme
As prescribed by NIELIT

National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology fee structure includes various components such as tuition fees, hostel fees, medical assistance fees, library fees and mess charges and other security deposits. Some of the comments are to be paid semester-wise, while other fees can be paid annually. Mentioned below are the NIELIT Agartala fees for various courses:

Admission to formal courses are conducted based on a candidate's academic merit. The application mode is online. Eligible candidates can apply for admission to their desired course at NIELIT. NIELIT Agartala offers courses which include both short-term courses and long-term courses. Mentioned are the details about the admission procedure of NIELIT courses 2025:

Step 1: Application Process: Candidates seeking admission to NIELIT, can apply online on the admission portal on the official website of the institute, and submit the application form after viewing the details. Also, candidates should attach the required documents for application at NIELIT.
Step 2: Selection rounds:Applicants get selected on the basis of performance in the last qualifying examination and entrance exam.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation:For final admission confirmation, candidates must complete the verification formalities and pay the admission fees.
